parameters.columns: =questionId, status, targetCollectionPath, targetLevelDocumentPath, documentData, previewText, telegramChatId, originalTelegramMessageId, difficulty, discipline, targetResolution, generationOptions, createdAt, updatedAt, provenance

parameters.jsCode:
function pickDefined(source, keys) {
  const result = {};

  for (const key of keys) {
    if (source[key] !== undefined && source[key] !== null) {
      result[key] = source[key];
    }
  }

  return result;
}

function compactSourceSufficiency(value) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") return null;

  return pickDefined(value, [
    "reason",
    "sufficientForDb",
    "sufficientForDraft",
    "sourceBriefQuality",
    "sourceBriefStatus",
    "sourceConfidence",
    "totalSources",
    "strongSources",
    "minSources",
    "hasCurated",
    "discipline",
    "researchEnabled",
    "saveToDb"
  ]);
}

function compactGenerationOptions(value) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") return null;

  return {
    ...pickDefined(value, [
      "mode",
      "topic",
      "categoryId",
      "levelId",
      "block",
      "type",
      "count",
      "requestedCount",
      "maxQuizCount",
      "countWasLimited",
      "saveToDb",
      "sendDocument",
      "format",
      "researchEnabled",
      "reviewEnabled",
      "autoReview",
      "researchProvider",
      "sourceCount",
      "sourceBriefQuality",
      "sourceBriefStatus",
      "sourceConfidence",
      "sourceBriefCacheHit",
      "requestedType",
      "resolvedQuestionType",
      "difficulty",
      "discipline"
    ]),
    sourceSufficiency: compactSourceSufficiency(value.sourceSufficiency),
    questionTypeResolution: value.questionTypeResolution || null
  };
}

const allowedDocumentFields = [
  "lang",
  "type",
  "difficulty",
  "discipline",
  "question",
  "answers",
  "correctAnswerIndices",
  "correctAnswer",
  "correctAnswers",
  "leftSide",
  "rightSide",
  "correctMatches",
  "categories",
  "statements",
  "text",
  "text1",
  "text2",
  "questions",
  "sliders",
  "facts",
  "explanation",
  "topics",
  "scientificDisciplines",
  "recommendedLiterature",
  "provenance",
  "categoryId",
  "levelId",
  "questionId",
  "num",
  "block",
  "slug",
  "status",
  "source",
  "createdAt",
  "updatedAt",
  "revisedFrom"
];

return $input.all().map((item) => {
  const source = item.json;
  const documentData = pickDefined(source.documentData || {}, allowedDocumentFields);
  const generationOptions = compactGenerationOptions(source.generationOptions);
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  return {
    json: {
      questionId: source.questionId,
      status: "pending_review",

      targetCollectionPath: source.collectionPath,
      targetLevelDocumentPath: source.levelDocumentPath,

      documentData,
      previewText: source.previewText,

      telegramChatId: source.telegramChatId,
      originalTelegramMessageId: source.originalTelegramMessageId,

      difficulty: source.difficulty || documentData.difficulty || null,
      discipline: source.discipline || documentData.discipline || null,
      targetResolution: source.targetResolution || source.generationOptions?.targetResolution || null,

      provenance: documentData.provenance || null,
      generationOptions,

      createdAt: source.createdAt || now,
      updatedAt: now
    }
  };
});

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.item.json;

const retrievedSources = Array.isArray(input.retrievedSources)
  ? input.retrievedSources
  : [];

const sourceIds = retrievedSources
  .map((s) => s.openAlexId)
  .filter(Boolean);

const sourceBrief = input.sourceBrief || "";

const difficulty = input.difficulty || 1;
const discipline = input.discipline || input.sourcePolicy?.discipline || "general";
const sourceProfile = input.sourcePolicy?.sourceProfile || "academic";
const num = input.num || 1;

const provenanceTemplate = {
  sourceBriefUsed: Boolean(sourceBrief),
  sourceCount: retrievedSources.length,
  sourceIds
};

const typeSchemas = {
  SINGLE_CHOICE: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "SINGLE_CHOICE",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    answers: ["...", "...", "...", "...", "...", "..."],
    correctAnswerIndices: [0],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  MULTIPLE_CHOICE: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "MULTIPLE_CHOICE",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    answers: ["...", "...", "...", "...", "...", "..."],
    correctAnswerIndices: [0, 2],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  TRUE_FALSE: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "TRUE_FALSE",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    correctAnswer: true,
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  SEQUENCE: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "SEQUENCE",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    answers: [
      "перший елемент",
      "другий елемент",
      "третій елемент",
      "четвертий елемент"
    ],
    correctAnswerIndices: [0, 1, 2, 3],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  MATCHING: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "MATCHING",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    leftSide: ["...", "...", "...", "..."],
    rightSide: ["...", "...", "...", "..."],
    correctMatches: [
      { leftIndex: 0, rightIndex: 2 },
      { leftIndex: 1, rightIndex: 0 },
      { leftIndex: 2, rightIndex: 3 },
      { leftIndex: 3, rightIndex: 1 }
    ],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  COMPARISON: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "COMPARISON",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    categories: ["Категорія 1", "Категорія 2"],
    statements: [
      { text: "...", categoryIndex: 0 },
      { text: "...", categoryIndex: 1 },
      { text: "...", categoryIndex: 0 },
      { text: "...", categoryIndex: 1 }
    ],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  TEXT_INPUT: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "TEXT_INPUT",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "Як називається поняття або термін, що ...?",
    correctAnswers: ["короткий термін", "варіант терміна"],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  FILL_IN_THE_BLANK: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "FILL_IN_THE_BLANK",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "У реченні пропущено короткий термін: ____.",
    correctAnswers: ["короткий термін"],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  IMAGE_CHOICE: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "IMAGE_CHOICE",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    answers: [
      { label: "...", imageUrl: "https://example.com/image1.jpg" },
      { label: "...", imageUrl: "https://example.com/image2.jpg" },
      { label: "...", imageUrl: "https://example.com/image3.jpg" },
      { label: "...", imageUrl: "https://example.com/image4.jpg" }
    ],
    correctAnswerIndices: [0],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  READING_COMPREHENSION: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "READING_COMPREHENSION",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    text1: "...",
    text2: "...",
    questions: [
      {
        question: "...",
        answers: ["...", "...", "...", "..."],
        correctAnswerIndices: [0],
        explanation: "..."
      }
    ],
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  SLIDER_SCALE: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "SLIDER_SCALE",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    text: "...",
    sliders: [
      {
        label: "...",
        min: 0,
        max: 100,
        correctValue: 50,
        tolerance: 5
      }
    ],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  },

  TEN_FACTS: {
    lang: "ua",
    type: "TEN_FACTS",
    difficulty,
    discipline,
    question: "...",
    facts: [
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "...",
      "..."
    ],
    answers: ["...", "...", "...", "...", "...", "..."],
    correctAnswerIndices: [0],
    explanation: "...",
    topics: ["..."],
    scientificDisciplines: ["..."],
    recommendedLiterature: [],
    provenance: provenanceTemplate
  }
};

const selectedTypeSchema = typeSchemas[input.type] || typeSchemas.SINGLE_CHOICE;

const prompt = [
  "You are an educational content generator for NoesisQuiz.",
  "",
  "Generate content in Ukrainian. Return only valid JSON. Do not use Markdown.",
  "",
  "REQUEST PARAMETERS:",
  `mode: ${input.mode}`,
  `topic: ${input.topic}`,
  `categoryId: ${input.categoryId}`,
  `levelId: ${input.levelId}`,
  `block: ${input.block}`,
  `num: ${num}`,
  `type: ${input.type}`,
  `count: ${input.count}`,
  `difficulty: ${difficulty}`,
  `discipline: ${discipline}`,
  `researchEnabled: ${input.researchEnabled}`,
  `sourceBriefStatus: ${input.sourceBriefStatus || "none"}`,
  `sourceBriefQuality: ${input.sourceBriefQuality || "none"}`,
  `sourceConfidence: ${input.sourceConfidence ?? "none"}`,
  `sourceCount: ${retrievedSources.length}`,
  `sourceProfile: ${sourceProfile}`,
  "",
  "SOURCE SUFFICIENCY:",
  JSON.stringify(input.sourceSufficiency || null, null, 2),
  "",
  "SOURCE SUFFICIENCY RULES:",
  "- If sourceSufficiency.sufficientForDraft is false, return JSON with status=\"insufficient_sources\" and do not invent a question.",
  "- If sourceSufficiency.sufficientForDb is false, the question can only be a draft for review and must not claim to be ready for database approval.",
  "- If sourceSufficiency.reason is insufficient_sources_for_db or weak_sources_for_db, be conservative and do not add specific facts that are not directly supported by sourceBrief.",
  "",
  sourceBrief ? `SOURCE BRIEF:\n${sourceBrief}` : "SOURCE BRIEF: none",
  "",
  "SOURCE-BACKED GENERATION RULES:",
  "- If sourceProfile = popular_authoritative, official, institutional, museum, educational, encyclopedia, and reputable public-reference sources are acceptable evidence.",
  "- If sourceProfile = academic, prefer scholarly references, primary texts, academic books, and peer-reviewed sources.",
  "- If SOURCE BRIEF exists, use it as the main evidence context.",
  "- If sourceBriefQuality is curated, treat CURATED SOURCES as the primary evidence layer.",
  "- Use OpenAlex only as an auxiliary metadata layer.",
  "- Do not prefer OpenAlex over curatedSources if they conflict.",
  "- Do not invent sources.",
  "- Do not attribute claims to sources unless they are present in sourceBrief.",
  "- If sourceBrief is weak or contains mostly reviews, formulate a cautious and broad question.",
  "- If sourceSufficiency.sufficientForDraft is false, do not create a question; return status=\"insufficient_sources\".",
  "- If sources are weak but sufficientForDraft is true, create a simple question only from facts directly supported by sourceBrief.",
  "",
  "QUALITY-AWARE GENERATION RULES:",
  "- If sourceBriefQuality is weak, avoid narrow factual questions, exact dates, exact numbers, and controversial claims.",
  "- If sourceBriefStatus is insufficient_sources, do not use retrieval-specific claims.",
  "- If sourceConfidence is below 0.5, formulate the question broadly and make the explanation cautious.",
  "- If sourceConfidence is 0.8 or higher, you may create a more specific question, but still stay within sourceBrief.",
  "",
 "TASK:",
"- If mode is question, create exactly one question.",
`- If mode is quiz, create a mini quiz with exactly ${input.count} questions.`,
`- If mode is quiz, the questions array length must be exactly ${input.count}.`,
"",
  "OUTPUT MODE RULES:",
  "- Return only valid JSON. No Markdown, no comments, no text outside JSON.",
  "- Never output null for categoryId, levelId, block, num, type, or data.type.",
  "- Never output the string \"undefined\".",
  `- categoryId must be exactly: ${input.categoryId}`,
  `- levelId must be exactly: ${String(input.levelId)}`,
  `- block must be exactly: ${input.block}`,
  `- num must be exactly: ${num}`,
  `- data.type must be exactly: ${input.type}`,
  `- data.difficulty must be exactly: ${difficulty}`,
  `- data.discipline must be exactly: ${discipline}`,
  "- If mode is question, return exactly one top-level question object.",
  "- If mode is question, do not return quizTitle.",
  "- If mode is question, do not return questions array.",
  "- If mode is quiz, the questions array length must be exactly count.",
  "- If mode is question, the top-level JSON must contain categoryId, levelId, num, block, slug, and data.",
  "- If mode is quiz, return quizTitle and questions array.",
  "- If mode is quiz, each item in questions must contain categoryId, levelId, num, block, slug, and data.",
  "- If mode is quiz, each question data object must match the selected type schema.",
  "",
  "TYPE-SPECIFIC SCHEMA:",
  JSON.stringify(selectedTypeSchema, null, 2),
  "",
  "QUESTION FORMAT:",
  JSON.stringify(
    {
      categoryId: input.categoryId,
      levelId: String(input.levelId),
      num,
      block: input.block,
      slug: "short-latin-slug",
      data: selectedTypeSchema
    },
    null,
    2
  ),
  "",
  "QUIZ FORMAT:",
  JSON.stringify(
    {
      quizTitle: "...",
      categoryId: input.categoryId,
      levelId: String(input.levelId),
      block: input.block,
      topic: input.topic,
      questions: [
        {
          categoryId: input.categoryId,
          levelId: String(input.levelId),
          num,
          block: input.block,
          slug: "short-latin-slug-1",
          data: selectedTypeSchema
        }
      ]
    },
    null,
    2
  ),
  "",
  "STRICT TYPE RULES:",
  "- Use only the fields from the selected type schema.",
  "- Do not add answers/correctAnswerIndices to types that do not use them.",
  "- Do not omit required fields from the selected type schema.",
  "- For SINGLE_CHOICE, answers must contain exactly 6 options and correctAnswerIndices exactly one index.",
  "- For MULTIPLE_CHOICE, answers must contain exactly 6 options and correctAnswerIndices exactly 2 or 3 indices; never return only one correct index for MULTIPLE_CHOICE.",
  "- For TRUE_FALSE, correctAnswer must be boolean.",
  "- For SEQUENCE, answers must contain 4 to 6 ordered items and correctAnswerIndices must match the correct order.",
  "- For MATCHING, leftSide, rightSide, and correctMatches are required.",
  "- For COMPARISON, categories and statements are required.",
  "- For TEXT_INPUT and FILL_IN_THE_BLANK, correctAnswers is required.",
  
  "- For TEXT_INPUT, the expected answer must be short: one word, one term, one name, one date, or one concise phrase of up to 4 words.",
  "- For TEXT_INPUT, do not ask open-ended explanatory questions such as 'what is the significance', 'why', 'how', or 'explain'.",
  "- For TEXT_INPUT, correctAnswers must contain acceptable short variants only, not full-sentence explanations.",
  "- For TEXT_INPUT, if the answer would naturally require a full sentence or interpretation, change the question to SINGLE_CHOICE unless the requested type is explicitly TEXT_INPUT.",
  "- For FILL_IN_THE_BLANK, the blank must be filled by one word, one term, one name, one date, or one concise phrase of up to 4 words.",
  "- For FILL_IN_THE_BLANK, correctAnswers must contain only short answer variants.",

  "- For TEXT_INPUT and FILL_IN_THE_BLANK, reject or revise if the expected answer is a full sentence, broad interpretation, or open-ended explanation.",
  "- For TEXT_INPUT and FILL_IN_THE_BLANK, approved correctAnswers must be short answer variants: one word, a named concept, a name, a date, or a concise phrase up to 4 words.",
  
  "- For READING_COMPREHENSION, text1, text2, and questions are required.",
  "- For SLIDER_SCALE, text and sliders are required.",
  "- For TEN_FACTS, facts must contain exactly 10 facts.",
  "",
  "STRICT CONTENT RULES:",
  '- lang must always be "ua".',
  "- correctAnswerIndices is zero-based.",
  "- If only one option is correct, use SINGLE_CHOICE, not MULTIPLE_CHOICE.",
  "- If the selected type is MULTIPLE_CHOICE, write the question so that 2 or 3 options are genuinely correct.",
  "- Wrong answers must be plausible but clearly incorrect.",
  "- In a mini quiz, questions must progress logically from basic facts to more complex ideas.",
  "- In quiz mode, num must increase from the starting num by 1 for each question.",
  "- slug must be short, Latin-only, and contain no spaces.",
  "- Do not invent sources. If no reliable source can be recommended, keep recommendedLiterature as [].",
  "- The question, answers, explanation, topics, and scientificDisciplines must be written in Ukrainian."
].join("\n");

return [
  {
    json: {
      ...input,
      openAiGenerateBody: {
        model: "gpt-4.1-mini",
        input: prompt
      }
    }
  }
];

") || "not specified") + "

return [
  {
    json: {
      sourceSetId: "history__kyivska-rus",
      discipline: "history",
      title: "Kyivska Rus",
      status: "active",
      reliability: "high",
      keywords: [
        "kyivska rus",
        "kyivan rus",
        "kievan rus",
        "kyiv rus",
        "rus"
      ],
      sources: [
        {
          sourceType: "curated_monograph",
          title: "Tolochko P. P. Kyivska Rus",
          author: "Petro Tolochko",
          year: 1996,
          publisher: "Abrys",
          place: "Kyiv",
          reliability: "high",
          note: "Curated Ukrainian historical monograph on the political, social, and cultural development of Kyivska Rus.",
          evidenceNotes: [
            "Kyivska Rus is treated as a medieval state of the Eastern Slavs.",
            "Kyiv was a political and cultural center of the state.",
            "The origin, structure, and legacy of Kyivska Rus have different historiographic interpretations."
          ]
        },
        {
          sourceType: "curated_monograph",
          title: "Motsia O. P., Rychka V. M. Kyivska Rus: vid yazychnytstva do khrystyianstva",
          author: "Oleksandr Motsia; Volodymyr Rychka",
          year: 1996,
          publisher: "Globus",
          place: "Kyiv",
          reliability: "high",
          note: "Curated historical work on the religious and cultural transformation of Kyivska Rus and Christianization.",
          evidenceNotes: [
            "Christianization was one of the key factors in the cultural transformation of Kyivska Rus.",
            "The transition from paganism to Christianity influenced political, cultural, and international connections of Rus."
          ]
        }
      ],
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      version: 1
    }
  }
];

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.item.json;

const sourcePolicy = input.sourcePolicy || {};
const sourceProfile = sourcePolicy.sourceProfile || "academic";
const isPopularAuthoritative = sourceProfile === "popular_authoritative";

const prompt = [
  "You are a research query planner for an educational quiz generation system.",
  "",
  "Your task is NOT to write educational content and NOT to invent sources.",
  "Your task is to transform the user topic into effective source-search queries for the selected source profile.",
  "",
  "Return only valid JSON. Do not use Markdown.",
  "",
  "INPUT:",
  JSON.stringify(
    {
      topic: input.topic,
      categoryId: input.categoryId,
      discipline: sourcePolicy.discipline || "general",
      sourceProfile,
      preferredProviderOrder: sourcePolicy.preferredProviderOrder || [],
      preferredDomains: sourcePolicy.preferredDomains || [],
      levelId: input.levelId,
      questionType: input.type,
      requestedSourceLimit: input.sourceLimit
    },
    null,
    2
  ),
  "",
  "SOURCE PROFILE RULES:",
  isPopularAuthoritative
    ? "- sourceProfile=popular_authoritative: prefer official, institutional, museum, educational, encyclopedia, and reputable public-reference sources. Academic sources are useful but not required."
    : "- sourceProfile=academic: prefer academic books, peer-reviewed articles, primary texts, academic references, and established scholarly reference works.",
  isPopularAuthoritative
    ? "- For erudite/general-interest questions, search for clear reliable explanations rather than narrow journal literature."
    : "- For academic categories, search for sources that directly support the concept, claim, work, theory, or problem in the user topic.",
  "",
  "QUERY RULES:",
  "- Prefer English search queries unless the topic is specifically local, Ukrainian, or better known in another language.",
  "- Do not transliterate as the main strategy unless the topic is a proper noun with no common English form.",
  "- Include the canonical English name if the topic is a person, concept, work, event, or theory.",
  "- Keep queries short and specific.",
  "- Do not invent bibliographic references.",
  "- Do not include URLs.",
  "- Avoid broad generic queries if the user topic is specific.",
  "",
  "OUTPUT JSON SHAPE:",
  JSON.stringify(
    {
      canonicalTopic: "string",
      detectedLanguage: "uk|en|other|unknown",
      discipline: sourcePolicy.discipline || "general",
      sourceProfile,
      searchLanguage: "en",
      searchQueries: [
        isPopularAuthoritative ? "authoritative public query 1" : "short academic query 1",
        isPopularAuthoritative ? "official reference query 2" : "short academic query 2",
        isPopularAuthoritative ? "encyclopedia or institution query 3" : "short academic query 3"
      ],
      referenceQueries: [
        "query suitable for official/reference websites"
      ],
      officialSourceHints: [
        "preferred institution, agency, museum, encyclopedia, or reference source type"
      ],
      requiredEvidence: [
        "claim or concept that sources should support"
      ],
      sourceSelectionCriteria: {
        preferredSourceTypes: isPopularAuthoritative
          ? [
              "official_source",
              "official_agency",
              "institutional_reference",
              "encyclopedia_reference",
              "curated_reference"
            ]
          : [
              "peer_reviewed_article",
              "academic_book",
              "academic_reference",
              "primary_text"
            ],
        rejectIf: [
          "book review only",
          "unrelated discipline",
          "no direct support for the topic"
        ]
      }
    },
    null,
    2
  )
].join("\n");

return [
  {
    json: {
      ...input,
      researchPlanPrompt: prompt,
      openAiResearchPlanBody: {
        model: "gpt-4.1-mini",
        input: prompt
      }
    }
  }
];
